sentences.en: The referral incentive structure needs to reward both the inviter and the invitee.
sentences.zh: 推荐激励结构需要同时奖励邀请者和被邀请者。

sentences.en: We achieved a 3x return on ad spend by narrowing our targeting to active traders.
sentences.zh: 通过将目标受众缩小到活跃交易者，我们实现了3倍的广告支出回报。

sentences.en: The sign-up to first deposit conversion is the weakest link in our funnel.
sentences.zh: 从注册到首次入金的转化是我们漏斗中最薄弱的环节。

sentences.en: Influencer marketing in the finance vertical requires careful compliance review.
sentences.zh: 金融垂直领域的网红营销需要仔细的合规审查。

sentences.en: The dormant user reactivation campaign brought back 8,000 accounts last month.
sentences.zh: 沉睡用户唤醒活动上个月挽回了8000个账户。

example.en: A return on ad spend of 3x means every dollar spent generates three dollars in revenue.
example.zh: 3倍的广告支出回报率意味着每花1美元产生3美元收入。

example.en: Both the inviter and the invitee receive a cash reward upon account opening.
example.zh: 邀请者和被邀请者在开户后都会获得现金奖励。

example.en: Reactivating dormant users is often cheaper than acquiring new ones.
example.zh: 唤醒沉睡用户通常比获取新用户更便宜。

example.en: Finance influencers on social media have huge impact on retail trading behavior.
example.zh: 社交媒体上的金融网红对散户交易行为有巨大影响。

example.en: The reactivation email series targets users who have been inactive for 30 days.
example.zh: 唤醒邮件系列针对已不活跃30天的用户。

sentences.en: The heatmap shows that most users ignore the banner at the top of the screen.
sentences.zh: 热力图显示大多数用户忽略了屏幕顶部的横幅。

sentences.en: We need to deprecate the legacy API before the new version goes live.
sentences.zh: 在新版本上线之前，我们需要废弃旧版API。

sentences.en: The accessibility audit found 15 critical issues that must be fixed before launch.
sentences.zh: 无障碍审计发现了15个必须在上线前修复的严重问题。

sentences.en: Real-time push notifications for price alerts increased daily sessions by 20%.
sentences.zh: 价格提醒的实时推送通知使日均使用次数增长了20%。

sentences.en: The conversion funnel visualization helped us spot a 40% drop-off at the KYC step.
sentences.zh: 转化漏斗可视化帮助我们发现了KYC步骤40%的流失。

example.en: The heatmap revealed that users rarely scroll below the fold.
example.zh: 热力图显示用户很少滚动到首屏以下。

example.en: We will deprecate the v1 endpoint six months after v2 launches.
example.zh: v2上线六个月后，我们将废弃v1接口。

example.en: Improving accessibility is not just ethical but also expands our user base.
example.zh: 改善无障碍性不仅是道德义务，还能扩大我们的用户群。

example.en: The biggest drop-off happens between the cart page and the payment page.
example.zh: 最大的流失发生在购物车页面和支付页面之间。

example.en: Data visualization makes complex metrics easier for stakeholders to understand.
example.zh: 数据可视化使复杂指标更容易被利益相关方理解。

sentences.en: The central bank's balance sheet reduction is tightening liquidity in the market.
sentences.zh: 央行缩表正在收紧市场流动性。

sentences.en: Earnings per share grew 25% year over year, beating the street estimate by 10%.
sentences.zh: 每股收益同比增长25%，超出华尔街预期10%。

sentences.en: The correlation between tech stocks and bond yields has strengthened this quarter.
sentences.zh: 本季度科技股与债券收益率之间的相关性增强了。

sentences.en: The company's gross merchandise value hit a record high during the Singles' Day promotion.
sentences.zh: 双十一促销期间，该公司的成交总额创下历史新高。

sentences.en: Sovereign wealth funds have been increasing their allocation to Asian equities.
sentences.zh: 主权财富基金一直在增加对亚洲股票的配置。

example.en: Low liquidity can lead to wider bid-ask spreads and higher trading costs.
example.zh: 低流动性可能导致买卖价差扩大和交易成本上升。

example.en: Diluted earnings per share is a more conservative measure than basic EPS.
example.zh: 稀释每股收益是比基本EPS更保守的衡量指标。

example.en: A negative correlation between two assets reduces portfolio risk.
example.zh: 两种资产之间的负相关性可以降低投资组合风险。

example.en: Singapore's sovereign wealth fund is one of the largest in the world.
example.zh: 新加坡的主权财富基金是全球最大的之一。

example.en: Increasing allocation to equities can boost returns but also raise risk.
example.zh: 增加股票配置可以提高回报，但也会增加风险。

sentences.en: The 360-degree feedback revealed blind spots in the manager's communication style.
sentences.zh: 360度反馈揭示了该经理沟通风格中的盲点。

sentences.en: We need to build bench strength so the team is not dependent on a single contributor.
sentences.zh: 我们需要培养板凳深度，这样团队就不会依赖单一贡献者。

sentences.en: The offsite workshop improved alignment between the growth and engineering teams.
sentences.zh: 外出研讨会改善了增长团队和工程团队之间的对齐。

sentences.en: Each team member should set stretch goals that push beyond their comfort zone.
sentences.zh: 每个团队成员都应该设定超越舒适区的挑战性目标。

sentences.en: The succession plan ensures continuity when a key leader transitions to a new role.
sentences.zh: 继任计划确保关键领导者转岗时的连续性。

example.en: 360-degree feedback collects input from peers, reports, and managers.
example.zh: 360度反馈收集来自同事、下属和上级的意见。

example.en: Strong bench strength means the team can absorb unexpected departures.
example.zh: 强大的板凳深度意味着团队可以消化意外离职。

example.en: The annual offsite focuses on strategic planning for the next fiscal year.
example.zh: 年度外出会议聚焦于下一财年的战略规划。

example.en: A stretch goal should be ambitious but not impossible.
example.zh: 挑战性目标应该有雄心但不是不可能实现的。

example.en: Every VP role should have a documented succession plan.
example.zh: 每个VP岗位都应该有书面的继任计划。

sentences.en: The platform strategy creates value by connecting buyers and sellers in a two-sided marketplace.
sentences.zh: 平台策略通过在双边市场连接买卖双方来创造价值。

sentences.en: We are pursuing an asset-light model to reduce capital expenditure.
sentences.zh: 我们正在追求轻资产模式以减少资本支出。

sentences.en: The scenario planning exercise identified three possible outcomes for the macro environment.
sentences.zh: 情景规划演练确定了宏观环境的三种可能结果。

sentences.en: Our competitive positioning hinges on superior execution, not just lower pricing.
sentences.zh: 我们的竞争定位取决于卓越的执行力，而不仅仅是更低的定价。

sentences.en: The ecosystem play locks in users by integrating trading, news, and community.
sentences.zh: 生态系统打法通过整合交易、资讯和社区来锁定用户。

example.en: A two-sided marketplace must solve the chicken-and-egg problem at launch.
example.zh: 双边市场在启动时必须解决先有鸡还是先有蛋的问题。

example.en: An asset-light model scales faster because it requires less upfront investment.
example.zh: 轻资产模式扩展更快，因为需要更少的前期投资。

example.en: Scenario planning helps leaders prepare for uncertainty rather than predict the future.
example.zh: 情景规划帮助领导者为不确定性做准备，而不是预测未来。

example.en: Clear positioning tells customers why they should choose you over competitors.
example.zh: 清晰的定位告诉客户为什么应该选择你而不是竞争对手。

example.en: Building an ecosystem increases switching costs and deepens user loyalty.
example.zh: 构建生态系统能提高转换成本并加深用户忠诚度。
